name: Vampire Grimson
name_jp: ヴァンパイア・グリムゾン
desc: If a monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can pay 1000 LP for each monster that would be destroyed, instead (you must protect all your monsters that would be destroyed, if you use this effect). At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card destroyed any monster(s) by battle: You can Special Summon them from the GYs to your field.
mnst_eff: If a monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can pay 1000 LP for each monster that would be destroyed, instead (you must protect all your monsters that would be destroyed, if you use this effect). At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card destroyed any monster(s) by battle: You can Special Summon them from the GYs to your field.
eff: If a monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can pay 1000 LP for each monster that would be destroyed, instead (you must protect all your monsters that would be destroyed, if you use this effect). At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card destroyed any monster(s) by battle: You can Special Summon them from the GYs to your field.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
